components.name: accordion
components.description: Collapsible accordion sections with single or multiple open items

components.name: alert
components.description: Semantic alert boxes with role='alert' and info/warning/destructive/success variants

components.name: badge
components.description: Status badges with multiple variants (default, success, warning, info, destructive)

components.name: blockquote
components.description: Styled quote blocks with optional citation

components.name: callout
components.description: Alert boxes for important information with variants

components.name: card
components.description: Card layout components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) plus LinkCard for navigation grids

components.name: code-block
components.description: Syntax highlighted code blocks with title and line numbers

components.name: code-group
components.description: Tabbed code block group — show npm/pnpm/yarn or multi-language examples side by side

components.name: emphasis
components.description: Text emphasis components for bold (strong) and italic (em) styling

components.name: file-tree
components.description: Simple string-based file/folder tree structure with minimal syntax

components.name: heading
components.description: Flexible and reusable heading component with variant support

components.name: headings
components.description: Markdown headings (H1-H6) with auto-generated anchor links for navigation

components.name: horizontal-rule
components.description: Divider lines with multiple styles (default, dashed, dotted, gradient)

components.name: image
components.description: Image with optional caption, plus ImageGlossary — responsive 1–3 column grid of images as seen in react.dev

components.name: inline-code
components.description: Inline code component for displaying code snippets within text

components.name: kbd
components.description: Keyboard shortcut display — styled <kbd> element for showing key combinations like Ctrl+K

components.name: list
components.description: Styled ordered and unordered lists with list items

components.name: math
components.description: LaTeX math rendering with block and inline support

components.name: mdx-components
components.description: Auto-discovering MDX component mapper - automatically uses all installed mdx-ui components

components.name: mermaid
components.description: Mermaid diagram rendering for flowcharts, sequences, and more

components.name: paragraph
components.description: Standard text paragraph component with proper spacing and typography

components.name: steps
components.description: Numbered step-by-step guides with visual indicators

components.name: table
components.description: Styled table components with header, body, footer, and caption

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tabbed content sections with state management and keyboard navigation

components.name: tree
components.description: Interactive file/folder tree structure for displaying project organization

components.name: utils
components.description: Utility functions for className merging (cn)

components.name: video
components.description: Video embed — auto-detects YouTube, Vimeo, and HTML5 video sources with aspect-ratio container and optional caption
